shows.name: Cosmic Journey
shows.description: A stunning voyage through the cosmos from our solar system to the edge of the observable universe.

shows.name: Stellar Evolution
shows.description: Witness the life cycle of stars from nebula birth to spectacular supernova death.

shows.name: Solar System Safari
shows.description: A family-friendly tour of our solar system's planets, moons, and more.

shows.name: Deep Sky Wonders
shows.description: Explore galaxies, nebulae, and star clusters beyond our Milky Way.

shows.name: Northern Lights
shows.description: Experience the aurora borealis and learn about solar wind interactions with Earth's magnetosphere.

shows.name: Mars Frontier
shows.description: Explore the red planet's geography, history, and future colonization plans.

shows.name: Black Hole Odyssey
shows.description: Journey to the edge of a supermassive black hole and witness spacetime curvature.

shows.name: Galaxy Zoo
shows.description: Tour diverse galaxy types from spirals to ellipticals to irregulars.

shows.name: Space Weather
shows.description: Learn about solar flares, coronal mass ejections, and space weather forecasting.

shows.name: Telescope Tales
shows.description: Discover the history and future of astronomical observation tools.

shows.name: Exoplanet Explorer
shows.description: Search for worlds beyond our solar system and assess habitability.

shows.name: Cosmic Collisions
shows.description: Witness dramatic impacts and mergers across the universe.

shows.name: Star Nursery
shows.description: Watch new stars being born in vast clouds of gas and dust.

shows.name: Planet Parade
shows.description: A grand tour of all eight planets with detailed surface visualizations.

shows.name: Nebula Dreams
shows.description: Float through stunning nebulae in vivid color and detail.

shows.name: Comet Chaser
shows.description: Follow comets on their long orbits and learn about these icy wanderers.

shows.name: Dark Matter Mystery
shows.description: Explore the invisible substance that shapes the cosmos.

shows.name: Saturn's Rings
shows.description: Get up close and personal with the jewel of the solar system.

shows.name: Asteroid Hunters
shows.description: Track near-Earth objects and learn about planetary defense.

shows.name: Cosmic Calendar
shows.description: Experience the entire history of the universe compressed into one year.

shows.name: Meteor Shower Magic
shows.description: Learn about meteor showers and watch stunning simulations.

shows.name: Eclipse Chasers
shows.description: Explore different types of eclipses and their science.

shows.name: Skywatchers Guide
shows.description: A beginner's guide to naked-eye astronomy and stargazing.

shows.name: Sunspot Stories
shows.description: Learn about our nearest star and its fascinating behavior.

shows.name: Red Planet Revealed
shows.description: Discover Mars through the eyes of rovers and orbiters.
